panels.title: Active Users (Approved AI Tools)
panels.description: Framework target: >70% of employees using approved tools

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT "user") AS active_users FROM "LiteLLM_SpendLogs" WHERE "startTime" > NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days'
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(spend), 0) AS total_spend FROM "LiteLLM_SpendLogs" WHERE "startTime" > NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days'

panels.title: DLP Blocks (30d)
panels.description: Data Loss Prevention policy enforcement — higher is more protective

panels.title: Daily Spend by Team
panels.description: Budget compliance — tracks team spend against allocated budgets

targets.rawSql: SELECT date AS time, team_id, COALESCE(SUM(spend), 0) AS spend FROM "LiteLLM_DailyTeamSpend" WHERE date > NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days' GROUP BY date, team_id ORDER BY date
SELECT date AS time, api_key, COALESCE(SUM(spend), 0) AS spend FROM "LiteLLM_DailyUserSpend" WHERE date > NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days' GROUP BY date, api_key ORDER BY date

panels.title: Model Usage Distribution
panels.description: Which models are being used — verify approved model compliance

targets.rawSql: SELECT model, COUNT(*) AS requests FROM "LiteLLM_SpendLogs" WHERE "startTime" > NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days' GROUP BY model ORDER BY requests DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT date_trunc('hour', "startTime") AS time, COUNT(*) AS requests FROM "LiteLLM_SpendLogs" WHERE "startTime" > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Error Rate
panels.description: Track API errors — framework target: >95% success rate

targets.rawSql: SELECT date_trunc('hour', "startTime") AS time, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status != 'success') AS errors, COUNT(*) AS total FROM "LiteLLM_SpendLogs" WHERE "startTime" > NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT "user" AS username, COUNT(*) AS requests, SUM(total_tokens) AS total_tokens, ROUND(SUM(spend)::numeric, 4) AS total_spend FROM "LiteLLM_SpendLogs" WHERE "startTime" > NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days' AND "user" IS NOT NULL GROUP BY "user" ORDER BY total_spend DESC LIMIT 20
SELECT * FROM "LiteLLM_AuditLog" ORDER BY updated_at DESC LIMIT 50
